code: import React from'react';import{useOrder}from'../../context/OrderContext';import'./OrdersPage.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const OrdersPage=()=>{const _useOrder=useOrder(),orders=_useOrder.orders;if(orders.length===0){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"orders-empty",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"No orders Found"})});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"orders-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Your Orders"}),orders.map((order,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"order-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"order-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h3",{children:["Order #",orders.length-index]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:["Ordered On: ",new Date(order.date).toLocaleDateString()]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{className:"order-table",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Title"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Price"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Quantity"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Total Price"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:order.items.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{title:item.title,children:item.title.length>30?item.title.substring(0,30)+'...':item.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("td",{children:["\u20B9 ",item.price]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:item.quantity}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("td",{children:["\u20B9 ",item.price*item.quantity]})]},item.id))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tfoot",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{colSpan:"3",style:{textAlign:'right',fontWeight:'bold'},children:"Grand Total:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("td",{style:{fontWeight:'bold'},children:["\u20B9 ",order.totalPrice]})]})})]})]},order.id))]});};export default OrdersPage;
